name: persist-process-metrics-resume
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Reloading intermediate stage data from a JSON artifact when a ctx field is None on resume in ProjectScylla's 16-stage E2E pipeline. Use when: (1) a stage uses `ctx.field or []` fallback that silently degrades on crash-resume, (2) the missing data was already written to disk in a prior partial run, (3) the reload guard must distinguish None (not set) from [] (set but empty).
